.file-embed.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(92, 214, 242, 0.59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
